name: STM Group Plc
description: STM Group Plc is a multi-jurisdictional financial services group listed on the Alternative Investment Market (AIM) of the London Stock Exchange. The company specializes in the delivery of professional services for international clients, including the administration of retirement solutions, pension plans, and life assurance products. Operating across key jurisdictions such as Gibraltar, Malta, Spain, and the UK, STM Group provides bespoke financial solutions to expatriates and international investors.
